biography: Erik is a familiar face to those who frequent the Hector Trophée, and is known for his calm demeanor on the course. Representing Ruukkigolf, Erik brings a strategic approach to the game, carefully plotting each move with precision.
While Erik has not yet claimed a Victor Trophy nor a Hector Trophée, his two appearances demonstrate a commitment to the sport and to the spirit of the tournament.

Although Erik is not expected to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, fans are hopeful that he will make a return in future years. His presence is valued, and his sportsmanship is admired by all who have the pleasure of competing alongside him.
